candidate_definitions.text: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.
Protein language model trained on coding DNA

This repository encapsulates all code required to reproduce the results of the paper ["Codon language embeddings provide strong signals for use in protein engineering"](https://www.nature.com/articles/s42256-024-00791-0), by Carlos Outeiral and Charlotte M. Deane.
Flexible and powerful tensor operations for readable and reliable code (for pytorch, jax, TF and others)
Burn is a next generation tensor library and Deep Learning Framework that doesn't compromise on flexibility, efficiency and portability.

Code for loralib, an implementation of "LoRA: Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models"
This repo contains the source code of the Python package `loralib` and several examples of how to integrate it with PyTorch models, such as those in Hugging Face.
Implementation of a memory efficient multi-head attention as proposed in the paper, "Self-attention Does Not Need O(n²) Memory"

Implementation of a memory efficient multi-head attention as proposed in the paper, Self-attention Does Not Need O(n²) Memory. In addition, the module will take care of masking, causal masking, as well as cross attention.
Microsoft Automatic Mixed Precision Library
__MS-AMP__ is an automatic mixed precision package for deep learning developed by Microsoft.
Accelerated deep learning R&D
<div align="center">

A lightweight library designed to accelerate the process of training PyTorch models by providing a minimal, but extensible training loop which is flexible enough to handle the majority of use cases, and capable of utilizing different hardware options with no code changes required. Docs: https://pytorch-accelerated.readthedocs.io/en/latest/

High-performance In-browser LLM Inference Engine
<div align="center" id="top">
🏝️ OASIS: Open Agent Social Interaction Simulations with One Million Agents.
<div align="center">

RWKV (pronounced RwaKuv) is an RNN with great LLM performance, which can also be directly trained like a GPT transformer (parallelizable). We are at RWKV-7 "Goose". So it's combining the best of RNN and transformer - great performance, linear time, constant space (no kv-cache), fast training, infinite ctx_len, and free sentence embedding.
RWKV website: https://rwkv.com (with 150+ papers training various RWKV models)
On-device AI across mobile, embedded and edge for PyTorch

Images to inference with no labeling (use foundation models to train supervised models).
<div align="center">

A library for accelerating Transformer models on NVIDIA GPUs, including using 8-bit and 4-bit floating point (FP8 and FP4) precision on Hopper, Ada and Blackwell GPUs, to provide better performance with lower memory utilization in both training and inference.
Pretrain, finetune ANY AI model of ANY size on 1 or 10,000+ GPUs with zero code changes.

Ascend PyTorch adapter (torch_npu). Mirror of https://gitcode.com/Ascend/pytorch

This repository develops the **Ascend Extension for PyTorch** named **torch_npu** to adapt **Ascend NPU** to **PyTorch** so that developers who use the **PyTorch** can obtain powerful compute capabilities of **Ascend AI Processors**.
